textByHash.2a5c12c28b8a1ba32844389e56559f9bc842f54d: Excuse me, , I believe I can help you.
textByHash.69fa6b34625e81d8cfd01fd0a5086dd1a757da4d: I couldn't help overhearing that you're trying to cheer up the Easter Bunny, and I have an idea.
textByHash.447da1c1dd80a0f57e8fd5c09d6d50f9846fc69f: Let's put on a performance! that will cheer him up.
textByHash.a5ac07b7ec1276ce6a5d5118135bb34e118afefd: Yes! He's always enjoyed a good show.
textByHash.f7a05dd763b25c0619e61a0deb68d0b1b8d1efdd: I have some classic material we can try if that sounds appropriate?
textByHash.a0d3022e2132544a2d7c75d5463515b89c997f96: Excellent! I've already talked to some of the other fellows in here about it too. They seem keen!
textByHash.1444eb40d04829785157a8b57b5df4dc90df49a8: I am Fry, master of dramatics. Player of plays, singer of songs!
textByHash.7a5e05e27a02f9f2b395931efaa313cca5697e46: I put on shows to entertain our patrons.
textByHash.c883d390bd27df6bcd511f343d02dc76b64d86e1: At least, I used to. We don't get many punters these days.
textByHash.a6b8e1a1735f97cb476431ddd22728174c1ad051: I don't know, Easter isn't as big as it used to be I suppose.
textByHash.faef46e9b6dbff3ce443c9d5c73173bcb8f7f378: It wasn't before, but I suppose it could be putting people off...
textByHash.e6535129d9c9049519d21500fb3706b1ac8dea3f: Hmm... Maybe we need a door...
textByHash.ef1201d40b500b502c7c3c42c6ca72aca05a8cd4: Hmm, I have noticed his recent sour mood. Let me think for a moment...
textByHash.31094791d0b9c60373d1a99b14e0753fe31838d7: Aha! I have it! Let's put on a performance! That will cheer him up.
textByHash.35dd6b95b22ed344957612c1e1cf0ab24300d08e: Well, I'll need some time to find something appropriate to perform.
textByHash.1b2cbd751ef18ad7ee3f23544dd38a337cc894f6: Of course, I'll need some performers.
textByHash.e7c82dc549e32debc754e96891b7297ecff77f97: Naturally! I'll talk to some other people too and get a good troupe together!
textByHash.95c7fc4725f6d7df492d6b791e969db3fe39d2a0: Of course not, you don't look deserving of a solo to me! Now run along, I shall begin my creative process.
textByHash.7187a8b8a0042060d3911e427fc69bca099ceb8a: Oh yes, I'm perusing potential performances and am planning which parts will be picked.
textByHash.8b396fcda9cf122b3b78ced35e1b4effb53ca103: Ah, hello ! I've a fantastic performance for us all to practise, if you are ready for a rehearsal?
textByHash.938df30a5ab764621d36b255de054ab4130a3c68: Alright then, let's assemble the troupe!
textByHash.1bf1b2ae1ffb6a648991b67a79890da7488cdd14: Oh hang on, we don't want to ruin the surprise.
textByHash.8f02654586af5fc0cf3dbac9e451993cbf82edfc: Easter Bunny! There's more fancy carrot juice at the bar!
textByHash.e7b80357eaf10244a7ad9b47b2ad72168f132bc7: Rightio then, let's get to it.
textByHash.9c86b4e31fc95a763a259a55ccf612190e831f3a: Time for the rehearsal! For the performance!
textByHash.8e2be220c8607f310d39591d17084b13f8084fec: Well I am, so hurry along. You've all had a chance to familiarise yourselves with my script, yes?
textByHash.11570309e43b421b180cd684bedcfd9fb2c29e11: Oh you jokers, come on then! To the stage!
textByHash.0483c3b1eb6c19475f843a4b105068fc86677a3e: Let's see what you've got then.
textByHash.9ac7cfa748c3a9f6d5b878509e14703f344cdf7e: From the top! First verse! And a one two three!
textByHash.a4a88f6d1c57bbc5c6fe8925b4226a13dc8b0336: Oh come on, it's an old standard!
textByHash.c7707910c719a7778f56218b757876fffe3f98a2: Well I don't have anything to hand, but you're welcome to have a look backstage.
textByHash.0e25a33e77117e0a968c98c375c9a07787473d1a: Have you found anything useful backstage yet?
textByHash.e5798f7ed95bc2acd9efdfa47f64d859e008c0cb: Oh that's great, but we'll need more than just costumes to wow the audience.
textByHash.13746de371a0c616aed64b6f7a06dde46412ac89: We need some material to perform!
textByHash.78b4f344ab0890a032924f6f6bd965eda41e5009: Well perhaps you should read it?
textByHash.4071f4990d0f37569c11b846ffaa4958432d86ae: An old script eh? Is it any good?
textByHash.524fece710e8c3af86c35eab21de1e40f9ae5e29: Well this is very interesting! Though I'm not sure how it would have been put together originally.
textByHash.b975d5d3ddb9d926dfb1c30da971de1f488dd8b9: In any case, it's definitely got the spirit of Easter written into it. Carrot costumes should suit this well.
textByHash.17a2cc7a02981dc110ad1af928e68cfc455bb324: I think we can use this, though the page order will need reviewing. Can you work out something good?
textByHash.c26fa42047bbbdd35904354bbe31469af595e92c: Wonderful, bring it to me once you're done and we shall get cracking! In the meantime, I'll get those costumes cleaned.
textByHash.d3abaf79ec286bac4872e3da19ee2ae791d84905: How is that script looking? Have you sorted it out yet?
textByHash.9c222496719c79460b3a305f87fd5aff18d016c5: Wonderful! I shall inform our colleagues, and fetch the Easter Bunny.
textByHash.c4edec9d67bfdf5c92a36121d01f1e3ebcf6782a: Good job putting that script in order, I think that went well!
